name: antigravity-awesome-skills
description: Repository-backed Codex plugin for the Antigravity Awesome Skills library.

interface.shortDescription: 1,328+ reusable skills for coding, security, product, and ops workflows.
interface.longDescription: Install the Antigravity Awesome Skills catalog as a Codex plugin and expose the repository's curated skills library through a single marketplace entry.
